mapper.sql: id, plan_name, duration_days, price, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted
mapper.select:
select
from t_vip_open_plan where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select
from t_vip_open_plan where is_deleted = 0 and status = 1 order by sort_order asc, id asc
select count(1) from t_vip_open_plan where is_deleted = 0
